==Japanese==

===Kanji===
{{ja-kanji|grade=3|rs=田04}}

# [[world]]
# [[border]]

====Readings====
{{rfv-pron|ja}}
{{ja-readings
|goon=け
|kanon=かい
|kun=さかい-<さかひ-
}}

===Etymology 1===
{{ja-kanjitab|yomi=o|かい}}
From {{der|ja|ltc|-}} {{ltc-l|界|boundary}}.

In Buddhist contexts, derived from the {{cog|ltc|-}} term used as a translation of {{der|ja|sa|धातु||layer, stratum}}.<ref>{{R:Nihon Kokugo Daijiten Concise}}</ref>

====Pronunciation====
{{ja-pron|かい|acc=1|acc_ref=DJR}}

====Noun====
{{ja-noun|かい}}

# [[boundary]]
# a [[bounded]] [[area]] or [[region]]
# a [[bounded]] [[group]] of [[people]], a [[society]], a [[world]] as a [[social]] grouping, such as business, celebrities, or finance
#: Used both as a standalone noun, and in compounds. Use in compounds is more common in this sense.
#: {{ja-usex|自然の'''界'''、自然'''界'''|しぜん の '''かい'''、 しぜん'''かい'''|the natural '''world'''}}
#: {{ja-usex|美術界|びじゅつ'''かい'''|the art '''world'''}}
# the [[border]] [[edge]] of a thing
# {{lb|ja|Buddhism}} the [[category]] of a thing
# {{lb|ja|Buddhism}} the [[world]] or [[realm]] of a thing
# [[line]]s drawn between the lines of a text, as on lined writing paper
# [[line]]s drawn to lay out a draft of a piece of artwork: a [[sketch]]
# {{lb|ja|biology|taxonomy}} a [[kingdom]]
# {{lb|ja|geology}} a [[stratum]] corresponding to a [[geologic]] [[age]]

{{list:taxonomic ranks/ja}}

|{{ja-r|物質界|ぶっしつかい}}: the material world
|{{ja-r|精神界|せいしんかい}}: the spiritual world
}}
